name: io.github.MKirovBG/scribefy-mcp
title: Scribefy
description: Search YouTube, get video metadata, and extract timestamped transcripts for AI workflows.

environmentVariables.name: SCRIBEFY_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Scribefy API key (sk_live_… or sk_test_…) from scribefy.app/dashboard. Available on the API + MCP plan.

environmentVariables.name: SCRIBEFY_API_BASE
environmentVariables.description: Override the API base URL. Defaults to https://api.scribefy.app.
